seoTitle: Carrs Island vs Carrs Peninsula — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carrs Island and Carrs Peninsula. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Carrs Island vs Carrs Peninsula: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carrs Island and Carrs Peninsula.
heading: Carrs Island vs Carrs Peninsula — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrs Island, New South Wales and Carrs Peninsula, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrs Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Carrs Island (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrs Island or Carrs Peninsula safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrs Island has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Carrs Peninsula scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrs Island scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Carrs Peninsula scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrs Island or Carrs Peninsula?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrs Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
